saved_test.name: Relative Clauses: V3 All Levels
saved_test.description: Page-local V3 package for Relative Clauses with A1-C2 coverage.

questions.question: This is the teacher {a1} helped me after class

a1.verb_hint: Choose a relative pronoun for a person.

variants: This is the teacher {a1} helped me after class

questions.question: The woman {a1} called you is my aunt

a1.verb_hint: Use who for people.

variants: The woman {a1} called you is my aunt

questions.question: I found the key {a1} opens this door

a1.verb_hint: Use which for a thing.

variants: I found the key {a1} opens this door

questions.question: This is the book {a1} I told you about

a1.verb_hint: Use that in a defining clause about a thing.

variants: This is the book {a1} I told you about

questions.question: This is the cafe {a1} we met

a1.verb_hint: Use where for a place relation.

variants: This is the cafe {a1} we met

questions.question: I remember the day {a1} we first spoke

a1.verb_hint: Use when for a time relation.

variants: I remember the day {a1} we first spoke

questions.question: That is the boy {a1} sister won the prize

a1.verb_hint: Use whose before the possessed noun.

variants: That is the boy {a1} sister won the prize

questions.question: The nurse {a1} works here is kind

a1.verb_hint: The relative pronoun is the subject of the clause.

variants: The nurse {a1} works here is kind

questions.question: The film {a1} we watched was funny

a1.verb_hint: The relative pronoun is the object of the clause.

variants: The film {a1} we watched was funny

questions.question: This is the camera {a1} I bought yesterday

a1.verb_hint: Do not repeat the object with it.

variants: This is the camera {a1} I bought yesterday

questions.question: My bike, {a1} is very old, still works

a1.verb_hint: After a comma, use which for extra information about a thing.

variants: My bike, {a1} is very old, still works

questions.question: The man {a1} lives next door is a doctor

a1.verb_hint: Avoid adding a repeated subject after who.

variants: The man {a1} lives next door is a doctor
